mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WAREHOUSES WHERE WAREHOUSE_CODE = #{warehouseCode}

SELECT WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseCode, WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, LOCATION AS location, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM WAREHOUSES WHERE 1=1
AND WAREHOUSE_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseCode}, '%')
AND WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY WAREHOUSE_ID DESC

SELECT WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseCode, WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, LOCATION AS location, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM WAREHOUSES WHERE WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE WAREHOUSES SET WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName}, LOCATION = #{location}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
